title: Bacteriostatic Mixer 10ml | UK Made Highest Quality Solution
features: Get it tested at a lab of your choice and we'll pay in store credit!
description: Product Description Welcome To Oxford Peptides. Serving over 80k customers worldwide. Supplying 99%+ purity research grade peptides. About Us. We deliver high-quality, low-cost research peptides across the UK and globally. Our mission is to simplify peptide synthesis, empowering scientists in hospitals, academia, and research to innovate with more freedom, flexibility, and lower costs—making discovery more accessible. Inspire By Collaboration. Inspired by the spirit of collaboration and curiosity that defines British science, our journey began in Oxfordshire and has grown into a multi-site operation serving a global network of researchers. Driving The Future. We believe that peptide research represents one of the most exciting frontiers in modern science, with limitless potential to transform healthcare and medicine. Corporate Social Responsibility. Our CSR initiatives reflect our commitment to making a positive impact beyond the lab. We are actively working to reduce our environmental footprint by minimising waste and exploring more sustainable materials and processes wherever possible. Championing Research. At Oxford Peptides, we don’t just support research, we champion it, helping lay the groundwork for the next generation of medical research breakthroughs and proudly backing the future of British scientific success.
